regions.text: The chief work of the ends of our fingers is touching. Here is a man who is not able to see.
That is a Braille book which he has before him. He is reading the book with the ends of his fingers.
Braille letters and words are like this. He is touching them with the ends of his fingers.
This other man is reading with his eyes. He is not reading with his fingers. What are those things on his nose? They are his glasses.
